news.title: Basic Materials Roundup: Market Talk
news.summary: 0432 ET – Gold’s safe-haven status is being tested during the current geopolitical tensions, Simon-Peter Massabni of XS.com writes in a note.  Global markets are reassessing the traditional concept of the yellow metal during times of crisis, with the recent decline towards $4,500 indicating a shift in investor behavior and in the relationship between gold and global monetary policies, Massabni says.  Interest rates, the U.S. dollar and liquidity conditions have become more influential towards markets than military or political tensions, Massabni adds.
